description: MyDeetz is a lead-generation service that lets businesses receive customer contact details from AI assistant conversations such as ChatGPT, without requiring a website contact form. It offers public business listing pages and delivers captured leads by email, with webhook delivery mentioned as a paid-plan feature.
summary: MyDeetz exposes a public MCP server at `https://app.mydeetz.ai/api/mcp`; no public developer REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found.
